arts.ttl: Mark Sykes, Max O'Leary and Harry Cornick: Bristol City injury news ahead of Sunderland clash
arts.sum: Liam Manning has admitted Mark Sykes' season has likely been ended prematurely by a quad injury sustained during Bristol City's warm-up ahead of their draw with QPR, while the Robins will decide today whether or not Max O'Leary can feature against Sunderland on Good Friday. Mark Sykes, Max O'Leary and Harry Cornick: Bristol City injury news ahead of Sunderland clash

arts.ttl: Player believes Sunderland serious about signing him – Drops hint about summer move
arts.sum: KVC Westerlo’s Matija Frigan was heavily linked with a move to Sunderland in the winter market. Back in January, we covered claims from Croatia which stated Régis Le Bris was keen on signing the striker. It was even reported his transfer to Sunderland was close, but the move didn’t materialise in the end. The 22-year-old The post Player believes Sunderland serious about signing him – Drops hint about summer move appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: 'Let's have a right go' - Liam Manning issues message to Bristol City squad ahead of final four
arts.sum: Liam Manning wants his Bristol City side to "have a right go" in their final four matches of the Championship season, with the Robins boss praising his playing squad for the "huge strides" they have taken in his first 18 months at Ashton Gate. Bristol City currently sit fifth in the Championship with just four matches remaining of the regular season

arts.ttl: Liam Manning makes George Earthy transfer admission as loanee nears end of Bristol City spell
arts.sum: Liam Manning has admitted he'd "love to" sign George Earthy permanently, insisting the West Ham United loanee fits the profile of player needed at Bristol City following his first-half equaliser against QPR. George Earthy has scored three Championship goals during his loan spell with Bristol City
